'''âsh-ch-h''' ('''kashachah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maingain|maingain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maingain|maingain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-ch-h
|-
! Lemma
| kashachah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishachah|thishachah]] || [[word:jishachah|jishachah]] || [[word:shishachah|shishachah]] || [[word:kishachah|kishachah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushachah|thuthushachah]] || [[word:jujushachah|jujushachah]] || [[word:shushushachah|shushushachah]] || [[word:kukushachah|kukushachah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushachah|thushachah]] || [[word:jushachah|jushachah]] || [[word:shushachah|shushachah]] || [[word:kushachah|kushachah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushachah|thushachah]] || [[word:jushachah|jushachah]] || [[word:shushachah|shushachah]] || [[word:kushachah|kushachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshachah|theshachah]] || [[word:jeshachah|jeshachah]] || [[word:sheshachah|sheshachah]] || [[word:keshachah|keshachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshachah|thothoshachah]] || [[word:jojoshachah|jojoshachah]] || [[word:shoshoshachah|shoshoshachah]] || [[word:kokoshachah|kokoshachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshachah|thoshachah]] || [[word:joshachah|joshachah]] || [[word:shoshachah|shoshachah]] || [[word:koshachah|koshachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshachah|thoshachah]] || [[word:joshachah|joshachah]] || [[word:shoshachah|shoshachah]] || [[word:koshachah|koshachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshachah|thĂŠshachah]] || [[word:jĂŠshachah|jĂŠshachah]] || [[word:shĂŠshachah|shĂŠshachah]] || [[word:kĂŠshachah|kĂŠshachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashachah|thathashachah]] || [[word:jajashachah|jajashachah]] || [[word:shashashachah|shashashachah]] || [[word:kakashachah|kakashachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashachah|thashachah]] || [[word:jashachah|jashachah]] || [[word:shashachah|shashachah]] || [[word:kashachah|kashachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashachah|thashachah]] || [[word:jashachah|jashachah]] || [[word:shashachah|shashachah]] || [[word:kashachah|kashachah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashachah|shashachah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashachah|goshashachah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashachah|gokishashachah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashachahnĂŒ|shashachahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashachahnknĂŒ|goshashachahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashachahnĂŒ|gokishashachahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashachahshĂ«|shashachahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashachahnkshĂ«|goshashachahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashachahshĂ«|gokishashachahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashachahro|shashachahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashachahnkro|goshashachahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashachahro|gokishashachahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashachahmu|shashachahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashachahnkmu|goshashachahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashachahmu|gokishashachahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashachahsher|shashachahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashachahnksher|goshashachahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashachahsher|gokishashachahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashachahng|shashachahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashachahnkng|goshashachahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashachahng|gokishashachahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashachahya|shashachahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashachahnkya|goshashachahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashachahya|gokishashachahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashachahyam|shashachahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashachahnkyam|goshashachahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashachahyam|gokishashachahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashachahnĂŒshĂ«|shashachahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashachahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashachahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashachahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashachahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashachahnĂŒro|shashachahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashachahnknĂŒro|goshashachahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashachahnĂŒro|gokishashachahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashachahnĂŒmu|shashachahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashachahnknĂŒmu|goshashachahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashachahnĂŒmu|gokishashachahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashachahshĂ«nĂŒ|shashachahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashachahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashachahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashachahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashachahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashachahshĂ«ro|shashachahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashachahnkshĂ«ro|goshashachahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashachahshĂ«ro|gokishashachahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashachahshĂ«mu|shashachahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashachahnkshĂ«mu|goshashachahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashachahshĂ«mu|gokishashachahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashachahronĂŒ|shashachahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashachahnkronĂŒ|goshashachahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashachahronĂŒ|gokishashachahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashachahroshĂ«|shashachahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashachahnkroshĂ«|goshashachahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashachahroshĂ«|gokishashachahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashachahromu|shashachahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashachahnkromu|goshashachahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashachahromu|gokishashachahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashachahmunĂŒ|shashachahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashachahnkmunĂŒ|goshashachahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashachahmunĂŒ|gokishashachahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashachahmushĂ«|shashachahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashachahnkmushĂ«|goshashachahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashachahmushĂ«|gokishashachahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashachahmuro|shashachahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashachahnkmuro|goshashachahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashachahmuro|gokishashachahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
